title: daedalacanthus macrophyllus
side_effects: Daedalacanthus macrophyllus can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, in individuals with sensitive stomachs. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to liver damage and impaired kidney function. Prolonged use of Daedalacanthus macrophyllus without proper guidance can also cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and respiratory problems. Furthermore, its interaction with certain medications can result in adverse effects, such as increased blood pressure and heart rate.
